message:
fix: hide empty preview panel in AddCardModal when no card is hovered (#3765) (#3771)

The preview panel on the right side of the Browse Cards tab was always
rendered, showing a sparse placeholder with dead space when no card was
hovered. Now the panel only appears when the user hovers over a card,
letting the card catalog use the full modal width by default.

Co-authored-by: andy anderson <andy@andys-MacBook-Pro.local>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
